name: DANA
mission: DANA helps downtown neighbors know what is changing, meet each other, and speak up for the place they call home.
paletteStatus: DANA green, crisp white, and a restrained gold accent.

membership.label: Resident Membership
membership.copy: For neighbors who want to meet people, receive useful updates, and support DANA's work.

membership.label: Building Membership
membership.copy: For buildings that want residents to know about DANA, attend events, and feel more connected downtown.

membership.label: Community Partner
membership.copy: For local partners who want to support resident events, outreach, and neighborhood advocacy.
